registered_target: For every S in independently frozen C* and every admissible effective machinery-closed representation R satisfying independently frozen P*, the closure contains an RCCD-equivalent kernel; RCCD is sufficient, nontrivial, componentwise irreducible, and maximal relative to frozen extension rules.
adjudicated_theorem: For every S and R satisfying the frozen C*, E*, P*, closure, and equivalence premises, the registered executable constructions recover an RCCD-equivalent operational package preserving the eight frozen dimensions; the package is sufficient by bidirectional reconstruction, componentwise independent under registered reductions, and maximal only under the frozen extension-challenge ledger.
weakening_reasons: terminal semantic theorem is compositionally and executably checked but not represented as one kernel-checked theorem over the full semantic model
maximality is relative to frozen extension rules and a finite registered challenge space
no unrestricted open-world, metaphysical, uniqueness, or ontology-finality claim is licensed

public_evaluation.scope: evaluation of the disclosed strictly weakened relative operational theorem only
